creator: bg.1nv1s1bl3@gmail.com
text:
I'm trying to run a STEAM HLDS (Half-Life Dedicated server) counter-strike 1.6 on this system. But when i try to run in, this error shows up:

Unable to determine CPU Frequency. Try defining CPU_MHZ.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

warning: A handler for the OS ABI "GNU/Linx" os not built into this configuracion of GDB. Attempting to continue with the default i386 settings


I've tried running the same kind of server, on slackware 12.0, it runs with no problems.
